title: Dentons Link Legal assists Ace Aviation on ₹568 crore acquisition of Jet Airways' Boeing 777-300ER Aircraft
description: Malta-based Ace Aviation, a member of the Challenge Group, was declared as the highest bidder for two Boeing 777-300ER aircraft previously owned by Jet Airways (India) Ltd. and currently parked at Delhi International Airport. The successful bid as per the stock exchange filings with BSE and NSE is ₹568.179 crore.The auction process and declaration of the Ace Aviation as the highest bidders was challenged by Industrial Asset Transaction Services Private Limited (“H2 Bidder”) before the NCLT, Mumb
